matrix_definition.rule: original fixes first_shortest=second_at_most_last=false; translated permits all five cut flags except endpoint=true with first_shortest=true

environment.execution_order: sequential in the order listed in matrix.json

mid_run_metadata_transition.change: circle_intervals.py gained the optional total_length_lower_bound parameter while the sequential matrix was running
mid_run_metadata_transition.command_effect: none; no matrix command supplied --total-length-lower-bound and the default is None
